title: Selnia (disambiguation)
content:
'''Selnia''' could refer to several different individuals:
*[[Selnia]], a gambler
*[[Selnia Gergeroe]], [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]]
*[[Selnia Harbright]], Senator
*[[Selnia Trigg]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
{{Disambig}}
